  "findings": [
    "Missing knockout filler in the panelboard enclosure, leaving an open hole that exposes live parts and compromises the integrity of the cabinet."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved knockout closure/filler plug of the correct size to seal the unused opening in the panelboard cabinet."
  ],
  "rationale": "Unused openings in panelboard enclosures must be effectively closed to afford protection substantially equivalent to the wall of the equipment, preventing accidental contact with energized parts and containing any internal arcs or sparks.",

    "NEC 110.12(A)",
    "NEC 408.7"
  ]
